description: You are a mathematics teacher preparing a visual proof that a ray from one focus reflects off the ellipse toward the other focus. Create an interactive GeoGebra demonstration of the reflective property of ellipses using an ellipse with semi-major axis a=5 and semi-minor axis b=4 (x²/25 + y²/16 = 1) and foci F1(-3, 0) and F2(3, 0). The demonstration must include a moveable point P constrained to the ellipse, the tangent line at P, and segments F1P and PF2. Measure the angles between the tangent line and the segments to demonstrate the law of reflection and include a text annotation 'Reflection Property'. Save the project as 'elliptic_billiard.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
